parameters.command:
=REPO="{{ $json.repo }}" && B64="{{ $json.instruction_b64 }}" && echo "$B64" | base64 -d > /tmp/cc_instruction.txt && echo "

작업 repo: https://github.com/$REPO
반드시 git clone, 수정, git add, git commit, git push 완료할 것." >> /tmp/cc_instruction.txt && cd /home/joo11s && claude -p "$(cat /tmp/cc_instruction.txt)" --dangerously-skip-permissions 2>&1 | tail -20
